name: ai_marketing_claude_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the ai_marketing_claude capability.

prompts.name: website_audit_prompt
prompts.template: Audit the following website focusing on marketing effectiveness and content quality: {website_url}
prompts.use_case: Performing comprehensive marketing audits for client websites

prompts.name: copy_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Generate compelling marketing copy for a product with these details: {product_details}, targeting {target_audience}.
prompts.use_case: Generating tailored marketing copy and email sequences to boost engagement

prompts.name: email_sequence_prompt
prompts.template: Create an email sequence for a campaign with the following parameters: {campaign_parameters}.
prompts.use_case: Planning and organizing advertising campaigns with automated assistance

prompts.name: ad_campaign_prompt
prompts.template: Plan an advertising campaign based on this marketing brief: {marketing_brief}.
prompts.use_case: Creating content publication calendars to streamline marketing efforts

prompts.name: competitive_intelligence_prompt
prompts.template: Provide a competitive intelligence analysis for the market related to: {product_details}.
prompts.use_case: Producing competitive intelligence reports to guide business strategy

prompts.name: content_calendar_prompt
prompts.template: Build a content calendar for the marketing initiatives based on: {campaign_parameters}.
prompts.use_case: Delivering professional marketing reports in PDF format for clients
